final:
module counter_4bit(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    output reg [3:0] count);
    
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
    begin end  // redundant
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 4'b0000;
        end else if (enable) begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end
endmodule
